title: Get in Touch - Gill Furniss MP
headings: h2: If you would like to get in touch, you can do so in the following ways:
h3: Due to strict Parliamentary rules, MPs can only assist their own constituents. Therefore, please ensure that you supply me with the following information:
h3: MPs’ Offices are NOT an emergency service. If you are in an emergency, contact 999 immediately. In a non-emergency situation, the below contact details may be useful:
h2: Follow me on social media
text_excerpt: Get in Touch - Gill Furniss MP Skip to main content Gill Furniss MP Home About Gill Latest News Newsletters In Parliament Help and Advice Benefits Education Employment Issues Health and Social Care Housing Issues Immigration Legal Matters Local Government Policy and Legislation Privacy Policy Get in Touch Disability Access Pride in Parson Cross More Menu Get in Touch If you would like to get in touch, you can do so in the following ways: Email: gill.furniss.mp@parliament.uk Telephone (voicemail message only): 0114 234 9079 Postal address: Gill Furniss MP House of Commons London SW1A 0AA Due to strict Parliamentary rules, MPs can only assist their own constituents. Therefore, please ensure that you supply me with the following information: Your full name Full address, including postcode Contact telephone number Any relevant reference numbers (Home Office Reference Number, National Insurance Number, Application Number, etc.) Our case reference (e.g. GF123456) if you are emailing regarding an existing case Every day I receive hundreds of emails from constituents and organisations. My team will always endeavour to respond to constituents as quickly as possible. However, please allow 10 working days for us to reply. Emails where I am CC’d in will be taken note of and filed appropriately but will not be responded to. I am unable to respond to all lobbying and campaign emails due to the vast amount of these which I receive. I can assure you that all these emails are read and taken on board. MPs’ Offices are NOT an emergency service. If you are in an emergency, contact 999 immediately. In a non-emergency situation, the below contact details may be useful: South Yorkshire Police 101 NHS 111 Sheffield City Council 0114 273 4567 (8am to 6pm, Monday to Friday) Sheffield Citizens Advice 0344 411 311 (10am to 4pm, Monday to Friday) Shelter 0808 800 4444 (8am to 8pm weekdays, 9am to 5pm weekends) Sheffield Domestic Abuse Helpline 0808 808 2241 (8am to 8pm weekdays, 9am to 5pm Saturday) National Domestic Violence Helpline 0808 200 0247 Assist (Asylum Support) 0114 275 4960 Migrant Help (Asylum Helpline) 0808 801 0503 Follow me on social media Residents Survey 2025 Gill Furniss MP Contact details Gill Furniss MP House of Commons London SW1A 0AA Gill Furniss MP House of Commons London SW1A 0AA '> View on Google Maps Email: gill.furniss.mp@parliament.uk Further details Promoted by Sheffield Brightside and Hillsborough Labour Party on behalf of Gill Furniss MP, both at Sheffield Labour Party, C/O Trades and Labour Club, Talbot Street, Sheffield, S2 2TG. ©2026 Copyright Labour All rights reserved.
